title: Trump invokes emergency powers with $23 billion in Gulf arms sales as Iran war wages on: WSJ report
summary_full: The U.S. approved roughly $23 billion in weapons sales to three Gulf nations, moving to bolster their defenses as the Middle East war continued to escalate.
summary_public: The U.S. approved roughly $23 billion in weapons sales to three Gulf nations, moving to bolster their defenses as the Middle East war continued to escalate.

IR.label: negative
